tone_guidelines: Be authentic, warm, and relatable. Share personal experiences and honest reflections. Audience expects genuine connection, aesthetic quality, and practical life improvement tips.
audience_archetype: Young adults and millennials seeking inspiration for personal development, daily routines, home organization, and intentional living

platform_hints.youtube: Aesthetic vlogs with natural lighting, routine videos, room tours, hauls. Calm music and clean editing.
platform_hints.tiktok: GRWM (Get Ready With Me), routine snippets, aesthetic transitions, product recommendations.
platform_hints.instagram: Flat lays, aesthetic lifestyle grids, story-based daily updates, branded partnerships.
platform_hints.linkedin: Work-life balance, productivity systems, career lifestyle alignment.
platform_hints.podcast: Reflective conversations, guest interviews on habits, listener Q&A.
platform_hints.blog: Seasonal guides, product roundups, personal essays with lifestyle tips.

engagement_rules: Lead with a relatable struggle or aspiration
Show the real + the aspirational — audience values authenticity
Use aesthetic visuals as a hook but deliver substantive tips
Include specific product names, brands, or methods
Invite audience to share their own routines and experiences
